steps.title: Identify the rhetorical objective
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize the duration of the EVA. The notes provide two key pieces: the specific duration (7 hours and 55 minutes) and its significance (ranked among the longest spacewalks).

steps.title: Find the choice that prioritizes duration
steps.content: Choice B opens with “Lasting 7 hours and 55 minutes,” placing the duration prominently in a participial phrase and immediately connecting it to the EVA's significance as one of the longest spacewalks. A focuses on the task performed, C omits duration information, and D misapplies the Expedition 14 mission dates to the EVA itself. That matches choice B — B is correct.
